message:
test(vendored): restore pool_batch_render_multiple_panes test

Re-enable the multi-pane batch render test that was removed due to
pre-existing UB in vendored codec stream_decode (copy_nonoverlapping
on overlapping memory regions). The UB was fixed in a7b05007 by
replacing copy_nonoverlapping with copy (memmove).

Test verifies: 3-pane batch request returns correct pane_ids in
request order, pool creates at least one connection.

All 129 vendored tests pass, 0 failures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
